source.detail: Birch-Murnaghan EOS bulk modulus (pymatgen b0_GPa) from the AtomisticSkills mat-equation-of-state Si example (.agents/skills/mat-equation-of-state/examples/Si/eos_results.json), matcalc EOSCalc over MACE-OMAT-0-small; equilibrium volume 31.34880012190209 A^3, r2 0.9999876441231208. The Pattern C EOS route to the same BulkModulus node the elastic-tensor VRH route also produces (Cu instance)
